title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Resonance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Resonance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Resonance family as a Curriculum Developer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Resonance:
Resonance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Resonance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
